title: BEM-824 verify dispatch result
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:55 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
results=[]
rd=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
if rd.exists():
    for p in sorted(rd.glob('*.status.json')):
        results.append({'path':str(p),'text':read(p)[:800]})
marker=load('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
if results:
    status='dispatch_results_present'
    next_action='parse result statuses and then check Claude runtime'
elif marker.get('status'):
    status='processor_marker_present_but_no_results'
    next_action='patch processor shell loop/result writer because marker exists but no result files'
else:
    status='processor_not_executing'
    next_action='patch codex-runner placement because marker missing'
state={'bem':'BEM-824','status':status,'result_count':len(results),'results':results[-10:],'marker':marker,'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem824_verify_dispatch_result_after_retry.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem824_verify_dispatch_result_after_retry.md').write_text('# BEM-824 | Verify Dispatch Result After Retry | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem824_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-824'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem824_verify_dispatch_result_after_retry.json','governance/reports/bem824_verify_dispatch_result_after_retry.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem824_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified whether workflow_dispatch_results appeared after BEM-822 queue retry and BEM-823 tick')
"""
